name: Fettunta Toscana (Grilled Bread with Tomates
recipeIngredient: 6 slices Country style bread, cut - 1/2 inch thick and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and cut them in half.
2. Remove as many seeds as possible and dice the tomatoes.
3. Combine the diced tomatoes with the torn basil leaves in a small bowl.
4. Grill or broil the bread slices until both sides are lightly browned.
5. Rub each slice of bread with a garlic clove.
6. Spoon some of the tomato mixture onto each slice of bread.
7. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, then drizzle with olive oil.
8. Serve immediately.
Variation: Fettunta co Rucola
Replace the basil with 1 small bunch of arugula, stems removed, and leaves finely diced.
